page_metadata.biotools__summary: Algorithm for realistic modeling of morphological tree clones. Here the morphological clones are defined as trees similar (and not the same) at the tree-level structure with varying fine-scale structural detail.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Algorithm for realistic modeling of morphological tree clones. Here the morphological clones are defined as trees similar (and not the same) at the tree-level structure with varying fine-scale structural detail.
